lines.english: and all your pain and darkness will be dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਕੀ ਸਭ ਮਿਟੈ ਬਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan kee sabh mittai balaae |
lines.english: All the misfortunes of your mind and body shall be taken away,
Your consciousness shall become immaculate and pure.
The Messenger of Death cannot even touch that humble being,
Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, cross over the world-ocean.
By great good fortune, one attains the Infinite Lord, the Primal Being. ||1||Pause||
The Gurmukh realizes his Lord and Master;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਪੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis kau pohi na sakai jamakaal |
lines.english: Who sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.
His coming into this world is approved. ||2||
his sexual desire, anger and madness are eradicated.
He knows the Lord God to be ever-present.
He sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, by the Grace of the Saints;
This is the Perfect Teaching of the Perfect Guru. ||3||
Meeting with the True Guru, all his affairs are resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam rang sang jaagaa |
lines.english: He is awake and aware in the Love of the Lord's Name;
He earns the treasure of the Lord's wealth.
O Nanak, his mind is attached to the Lord's Feet. ||4||14||16||
The Lord's Feet are the boat to cross over the terrifying world-ocean.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਮ ਪੰਥ ॥
lines.translit: har gun ramat naahee jam panth |
lines.english: Chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, he does not have to walk on the Path of Death.
Contemplating the Supreme Lord, the five demons are conquered. ||1||
Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he does not die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਤ ਅਪਨੇ ਕਉ ਦੀਜਹਿ ਹਾਥ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jant apane kau deejeh haath |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Please give Your hand to Your creatures. ||1||Pause||
The Simritees, Shaastras, Vedas and Puraanas
I have entered Your Sanctuary, O Perfect Lord and Master.
expound upon the Supreme Lord God.
cannot find the limits of the Eternal Lord God. ||2||
The Yogis, celibates, Vaishnavs and followers of Ram Das
Shiva and the gods lament and moan,
but they do not understand even a tiny bit of the unseen and unknown Lord.
One whom the Lord Himself blesses with loving devotional worship,
is very rare in this world. ||3||
I am worthless, with absolutely no virtue at all;
all treasures are in Your Glance of Grace.
Nanak, the meek, desires only to serve You.
Please be merciful, and grant him this blessing, O Divine Guru. ||4||15||17||
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
One who is cursed by the Saints, is thrown down on the ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ਅਕਾਸ ਤੇ ਟਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant kaa nindak akaas te ttaarau |
lines.english: The slanderer of the Saints is thrown down from the skies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕਉ ਰਾਖਉ ਅਪਨੇ ਜੀਅ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sant kau raakhau apane jeea naal |
lines.english: I hold the Saints close to my soul.
He alone is a Saint, who is pleasing to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕੈ ਏਕੈ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant gobind kai ekai kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Saints, and God, have only one job to do. ||1||Pause||
The Saints are saved instantaneously. ||1||
With each and every breath, He cherishes His Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai sang basai din raat |
lines.english: He dwells with His Saints, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਊਪਰਿ ਦੇਇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai aoopar dee prabh haath |
lines.english: God gives His hand to shelter the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਦੋਖੀ ਰਾਜ ਤੇ ਟਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant kaa dokhee raaj te ttaal |2|
lines.english: He takes the power away from the enemies of the Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kee nindaa karahu na koe |
lines.english: Let no one slander the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦੈ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਪਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo nindai tis kaa patan hoe |
lines.english: Whoever slanders them, will be destroyed.
cannot be harmed, no matter how much the whole world may try. ||3||
One who is protected by the Creator Lord,
I place my faith in my God.
the self-willed manmukhs will fail, while the Gurmukhs will always win. ||4||16||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis kee raas |
lines.english: My soul and body all belong to Him.
This is the faith which inspires Nanak:
Chanting it with the tongue, sins are washed away. ||1||Pause||
The Name of the Immaculate Lord is the Ambrosial Water.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
